text:
Makaha (マカハ, Makaha) is a soldier of the Kakin Empire. Together with and according to her half-sister Longhi, Makaha is one of at least ten "strong curse sacrifices", infants that Beyond Netero fathered and marked in preparation for the Succession Contest. Hunter × Hunter, Chapter 401 

Personality

Not much is known about Makaha's personality. Makaha has some degree of emotional awareness since she was aware that her parents did not mirror her disappointment in not being selected to be 2 nd Prince Camilla's guard and found their blasé response to be suspicious. She had some awareness of going against social norms since she investigated her situation in secret. 

Background

Makaha is Beyond's child, strongly implied to be raised by the woman who carried her and a young officer of the Kakin army in a marriage arranged by Beyond. As an infant, Makaha received a "Nen attack" from Beyond, awakening her to Nen as an infant, and leaving a curse on her that she would eventually learn of after the Seed Urn Ceremony took place. 

Makaha was enrolled in Kakin's Royal Military Academy and (as part of the second graduating class) was expected to become a personal guard for 2 nd Prince Camilla until Camilla selected the Have-Nots for the position. She then investigated her situation in secret and came into contact with Longhi. Together, they discovered the mark left on them by Beyond's Nen attack on them in their infancy. 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

Makaha is first mentioned on the tenth day of the voyage by her half-sister, Longhi. At 11:45 a.m. on the tenth day, Longhi, who had been attending lessons in Room 1014 but concealing her Nen from Kurapika thus far, was invited into Room 1014's master bedroom by Kurapika and Bill to have her Nen divined. Once behind closed doors, to get Kurapika's assistance and as a requirement to add additional clauses to the contract between Tubeppa and Woble for Kurapika to fulfill using her Moonlight Act, Longhi explains her background and motivations for her request to Kurapika. Longhi explains that Beyond is her father and that she suspects Beyond of fathering a child among the Princes, whom she wishes to get assistance from Kurapika to identify. 

Longhi mentions that she had discovered that Beyond had turned her and many of her half-siblings into curse sacrifices of varying strength from one such half-sister, Makaha. Longhi recounts that Makaha had become suspicious of her parents, who had been trying to inspire her with Beyond's goal of unifying the world under Kakin as she made her way through the Kakin Royal Military Academy in the hopes of becoming 2 nd Prince Camilla's personal guard, but did not mirror her disappointment when Camilla's Have-Nots were selected for the role instead of her class. Makaha's confusion as to why her parents were so blasé about her not making the cut led her to investigate in secret and discover Longhi while Longhi was serving under 2 nd Queen Duazul, Camilla's mother. 

After the Seed Urn Ceremony, Makaha and Longhi discovered a mark in common between them, which they showed to a renowned Nen user The Viz translation says that they showed their mark to a renowned exorcist, but the Kanji used in the original Japanese text described a Nen user who told them that a powerful and sinister Nen possessed them that would activate upon their deaths, the likes of which he had never seen before. The Nen user told the two of them that they were "strong curse sacrifices", with marks that could not be removed by simply burning the surface or cutting it off. 

Nen

As a side effect of the "Nen attack" on her by Beyond during her infancy to impart a curse on her, Makaha has essentially been a Nen user since birth. Since newborns with Nen instinctively learn Ten and Zetsu to prevent fatigue, she is likely proficient in at least these two aspects of Nen.
